title: derris kingdonwardii
intro: Derris kingdonwardii, also known as the Kanthari plant, is a tropical plant native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The extracts from Derris kingdonwardii have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating snake bites, and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powders, and it can be consumed orally or applied topically to its affected areas.
